---
title: "ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
</style>

<!-- ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-badge">SMU MITB · ISSS608 · AY2025/26</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Visual Analytics &amp; Applications</h1>
  <p class="hero-tagline">
    A portfolio of data visualisation work exploring interactive graphics, statistical analysis,
    and visual storytelling with R and Tableau.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <span class="stat-number">16</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Hands-on Exercises</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <span class="stat-number">2</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Major Projects</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <span class="stat-number">8</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Tableau Dashboards</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <span class="stat-number">1</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Shiny App</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ── Take-home Exercises ───────────────────── -->
<details class="section-accordion">
  <summary class="section-header">
    <div class="section-dot takehome"></div>
    <span class="section-label">Take-home Exercises</span>
    <span class="section-count">2 projects</span>
    <span class="section-chevron">&#8250;</span>
  </summary>

  <div class="section-body">
    <div class="project-grid">

      <div class="project-card takehome">
        <div class="project-number">Project 01</div>
        <div class="project-title">Motor Insurance Portfolio Analysis</div>
        <p class="project-desc">
          Univariate and bivariate visual analytics of a Spanish motor insurance portfolio
          (2022–2024), examining driver profiles, vehicle characteristics, premiums, claims,
          and loss ratios using ggplot2 and tidyverse.
        </p>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link primary" href="Take-home_Ex/Take-home_Ex01/executive_summary.html">Executive Summary</a>
          <a class="project-link secondary teal" href="Take-home_Ex/Take-home_Ex01/technical_report.html">Technical Report</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card takehome">
        <div class="project-number">Project 02</div>
        <div class="project-title">VAST Challenge 2026 MC1 — TenantThread Crisis</div>
        <p class="project-desc">
          A multi-agent visual analytics investigation into the TenantThread embargo breach
          using network analysis, text visualisation, and interactive graphics to uncover
          communication patterns and key actors.
        </p>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a class="project-link primary" href="Take-home_Ex/Take-home_Ex02/mc1_analysis_r.html">Analysis Report</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</details>


<!-- ── Hands-on Exercises ────────────────────── -->
<details class="section-accordion">
  <summary class="section-header">
    <div class="section-dot handson"></div>
    <span class="section-label">Hands-on Exercises</span>
    <span class="section-count">16 exercises</span>
    <span class="section-chevron">&#8250;</span>
  </summary>

  <div class="section-body">

    <!-- Ch 1–2 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 1–2 · Introduction</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex01/Hands-on_Ex01.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 1</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Introduction to Visual Analytics with ggplot2</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex02/Hands-on_Ex02.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 2</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Designing Graphs to Enlighten</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ch 3 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 3 · Interactivity in Visual Analytics</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex03/Hands-on_Ex03a.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 3a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Programming Interactive Data Visualisation with R</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex03/Hands-on_Ex03b.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 3b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Programming Animated Statistical Graphics with R</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ch 4 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 4 · Fundamentals of Visual Analytics</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex04/Hands-on_Ex04a.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 4a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visualising Distribution</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex04/Hands-on_Ex04b.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 4b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visual Statistical Analysis</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex04/Hands-on_Ex04c.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 4c</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visualising Uncertainty</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex04/Hands-on_Ex04d.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 4d</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Building Funnel Plots with R</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ch 5 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 5 · Visual Multivariate Analysis</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex05/Hands-on_Ex05a.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 5a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Building Ternary Plots with R</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex05/Hands-on_Ex05b.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 5b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visual Correlation Analysis</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex05/Hands-on_Ex05c.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 5c</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visual Multivariate Analysis with Heatmap</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex05/Hands-on_Ex05d.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 5d</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Parallel Coordinates Plot</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex05/Hands-on_Ex05e.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 5e</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Treemap Visualisation with R</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ch 7 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 7 · Network &amp; Text Data</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex07/Hands-on_Ex07a.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 7a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visualising and Analysing Network Data</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex07/Hands-on_Ex07b.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 7b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visualising and Analysing Text Data</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ch 8 -->
    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Chapter 8 · Time-Oriented Data</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card handson" href="Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex08/Hands-on_Ex08.html">
          <div class="ex-tag">Exercise 8</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Visualising and Analysing Time-Oriented Data</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</details>


<!-- ── In-class Exercises ────────────────────── -->
<details class="section-accordion">
  <summary class="section-header">
    <div class="section-dot inclass"></div>
    <span class="section-label">In-class Exercises</span>
    <span class="section-count">8 Tableau · 1 Shiny</span>
    <span class="section-chevron">&#8250;</span>
  </summary>

  <div class="section-body">

    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Tableau Public Dashboards</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid">
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-Class_Ex02_17771004530650/Dashboard1?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 1</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Dashboard 1 · Tableau Public</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex03_17777052978680/SuperstoreSalesReport?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 2</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Superstore Sales Report</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex03b_17777067081690/AgeGroupbyGenderandPlanningArea?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 3</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Age Group by Gender and Planning Area</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex04Showmethestatistics/EnglishScoreStatistics?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 4a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">English Score Statistics</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex04Divergingstackedbarchart/FoodServiceKPIReport?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 4b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Food Service KPI Report</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex05_17789148967870/Treemapofnumberofunitssoldandunitpricebygeography?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 5a</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Treemap of Units Sold by Geography</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a class="exercise-card tableau" href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/jiayan.wu/viz/In-class_Ex05b_17789167119670/Treepmapofsalesandprofitbygeography?publish=yes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 5b</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Sales and Profit by Geography</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="chapter-group">
      <p class="chapter-label">Shiny Application</p>
      <div class="exercise-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 320px));">
        <a class="exercise-card shiny" href="https://wujiayan.shinyapps.io/Shiny/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <div class="ex-tag">In-class 6</div>
          <p class="ex-title">Interactive Shiny App</p>
          <span class="ex-arrow">↗</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</details>


<!-- ── Author ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="author-strip">
  <div class="author-avatar">WJ</div>
  <div>
    <div class="author-name">Wu Jiayan</div>
    <div class="author-meta">MITB · Singapore Management University · 2025</div>
  </div>
  <div class="author-links">
    <a class="author-link" href="about.html">Resources</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
